description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow has four jobs: build, docs, lint, and check-pr. The build job runs on multiple OS and GCC versions, installs dependencies, clones DFHack, sets up the environment, fetches DF cache, downloads DF, builds DFHack, runs tests, and uploads test artifacts. The docs job builds and uploads documentation. The lint job checks code style and syntax. The check-pr job verifies that a pull request is based on the develop branch.
